message:
fix(tests): Correct time_e2e test expectations

- test_interval_zero_period_behavior: Add #[should_panic] since zero
  period correctly panics in the implementation
- test_timeout_cancel_propagation: Create DropTracker before async block
  since async body only executes when polled

Both tests now pass (42/42 time_e2e tests green).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
